FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.26sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f63a8f9b2e0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T22:16:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T22:14:38Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T22:16:04Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T22:14:38Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/08 22:17:34.490424124 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490425346 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490446694 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490447598 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490466984 {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490467919 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490480075 new <- list()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490481085 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490494526 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490495611 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490509574 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490510451 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490524682 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490525522 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490539932 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490540911 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490554634 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490555573 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490569842 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490570817 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490584875 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490585791 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490599656 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490600481 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490614329 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490615280 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490627885 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490628812 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490642166 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490643145 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490658408 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490659442 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490686564 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490687578 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490703053 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490703954 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490719339 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490720222 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490735766 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490736661 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490752654 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490753670 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490772318 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490773318 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490791646 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490792634 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490809951 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490810892 "default"))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490827782 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490828609 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490842859 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490843761 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490858604 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490859490 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490874288 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490875179 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490890462 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490891365 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490903921 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490904861 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490917711 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490918689 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490933563 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490934521 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490950710 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490951681 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490964622 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490965658 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490981651 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490982441 version <- old$version
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490994547 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490995511 "2.0")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491009911 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491010867 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491029239 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491031888 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491070851 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491072611 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491097209 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491097739 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491105905 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491106448 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491115997 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491116513 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491126474 invisible()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491126996 }

2026/05/08 22:17:34.490424124 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490425346 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490446694 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490447598 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490466984 {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490467919 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490480075 new <- list()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490481085 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490494526 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490495611 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490509574 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490510451 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490524682 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490525522 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490539932 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490540911 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490554634 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490555573 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490569842 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490570817 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490584875 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490585791 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490599656 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490600481 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490614329 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490615280 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490627885 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490628812 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490642166 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490643145 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490658408 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490659442 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490686564 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490687578 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490703053 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490703954 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490719339 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490720222 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490735766 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490736661 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490752654 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490753670 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490772318 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490773318 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490791646 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490792634 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490809951 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490810892 "default"))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490827782 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490828609 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490842859 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490843761 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490858604 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490859490 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490874288 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490875179 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490890462 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490891365 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490903921 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490904861 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490917711 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490918689 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490933563 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490934521 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490950710 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490951681 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490964622 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490965658 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490981651 }
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490982441 version <- old$version
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490994547 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/08 22:17:34.490995511 "2.0")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491009911 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491010867 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491029239 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491031888 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491070851 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491072611 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491097209 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491097739 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491105905 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491106448 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491115997 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491116513 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491126474 invisible()
2026/05/08 22:17:34.491126996 }
